heading: Definitions

children.label: A
children.text: The agricultural conservation easement program.

children.label: B
children.text: The environmental quality incentives program.

children.label: C
children.text: The conservation stewardship program, not including the grassland conservation initiative under .section 3839aa–25 of this title

children.label: D
children.text: The healthy forests reserve program established under .section 6571 of this title

children.label: E
children.text: The conservation reserve program established under subpart B of part I of subchapter IV.

children.label: F
children.text: The programs established by the Secretary to carry out the Watershed Protection and Flood Prevention Act ( et seq.), except for any program established by the Secretary to carry out section 14 () of that Act.16 U.S.C. 100116 U.S.C. 1012

children.heading: Eligible activity
children.label: 2 Eligible activity
children.text: The term “eligible activity” means a practice, activity, agreement, easement, or related conservation measure that is available under the statutory authority for a covered program.

children.heading: Eligible land
children.label: 3 Eligible land
children.text: The term “eligible land” means any agricultural or nonindustrial private forest land or associated land on which the Secretary determines an eligible activity would help achieve conservation benefits.

children.label: A
children.text: An agricultural or silvicultural producer association or other group of producers.

children.label: B
children.text: A State or unit of local government.

children.label: C
children.text: An Indian tribe.

children.label: D
children.text: A farmer cooperative.

children.label: E
children.text: A water district, irrigation district, acequia, rural water district or association, or other organization with specific water delivery authority to producers on agricultural land.

children.label: F
children.text: A municipal water or wastewater treatment entity.

children.label: G
children.text: An institution of higher education.

children.label: i
children.text: local conservation priorities related to agricultural production, wildlife habitat development, or nonindustrial private forest land management; or

children.label: ii
children.text: critical watershed-scale soil erosion, water quality, sediment reduction, or other natural resource issues.

children.label: I
children.text: An organization described in .section 3865a(3)(B) of this title

children.label: J
children.text: A conservation district.

children.heading: Partnership agreement
children.label: 5 Partnership agreement
children.text: The term “partnership agreement” means the programmatic agreement entered into between the Secretary and an eligible partner, subject to the terms and conditions under .section 3871b of this title

children.heading: Program
children.label: 6 Program
children.text: The term “program” means the regional conservation partnership program established by this subchapter.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “program contract” means the contract between the Secretary and a producer entered into under this subchapter.

children.heading: Exclusion
children.label: B Exclusion
children.text: The term “program contract” does not include a contract under a covered program.
